### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Queries](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Queries.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Queries')

## IQueryResponse\<T\> Interface

Defines the response contract for query projections with mandatory projection type metadata\.
Implement this interface on query response types to enforce compile\-time safety
for projection type identification \(FR62\)\.

```csharp
public interface IQueryResponse<out T>
```
#### Type parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Queries.IQueryResponse_T_.T'></a>

`T`

The projection data type\. Covariant to allow
            `IQueryResponse<DerivedType>` to be assigned to `IQueryResponse<BaseType>`\.
### Properties

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Queries.IQueryResponse_T_.Data'></a>

Gets the projection data returned by the query\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Queries.IQueryResponse_T_.ProjectionType'></a>

## IQueryResponse\<T\>\.ProjectionType Property

Gets the projection type name used for ETag scope\.
Use short kebab\-case names \(e\.g\., `counter`, `order-list`\) — they are
base64url\-encoded in self\-routing ETags, so longer names produce longer HTTP header values \(FR64\)\.
Must not contain `:` \(colon — actor ID separator\) or exceed 100 characters\.

```csharp
string ProjectionType { get; }
```

#### Property Value
[System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')
